_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
The workspace has **no registration or reporting obligations** under Regulation (EU) 2019/1242. The Regulation's reporting framework (under Regulation (EU) 2018/956) applies to Member State competent authorities and vehicle manufacturers.

**Adjacent reporting intersection — Legal Confirmation Required:** The proposed Regulation on harmonised measurement of transport and logistics emissions (COM(2023) 441 final, political agreement reached November 2025 per DG MOVE reporting) is expected to create emissions-data provision and reporting obligations that will interact with the road emissions data generated under the HDV CO2 framework. When that Regulation enters into force, freight forwarders may have obligations to account for road leg emissions using methodologies that reference VECTO-derived values. That regulation is tracked separately; the workspace should monitor its implementation timeline.

*Source: European Commission – DG MOVE, "Commission welcomes political agreement on new rules to harmonise transport emissions calculations in the EU," November 2025. https://transport.ec.europa.eu/news-events/news/commission-welcomes-political-agreement-new-rules-harmonise-transport-emissions-calculations-eu-2025-11-06_en*

*Source: EUR-Lex (Official Journal / European Commission), COM(2023) 441 final. https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=comnat:COM_2023_0441_FIN*

---
